decisions.rationale: Root = cnogo dev; CLAUDE-generic.md = template for new projects; .claude/CLAUDE.md = workflow docs for all targets
Claude Code auto-loads both root and .claude/CLAUDE.md. Workflow docs are cnogo's domain, safe to always overwrite
.claude/CLAUDE.md handles workflow docs; root file is the project's own
It's cnogo's file, not the user's. Safe to update on reinstall
Stack-agnostic playbooks useful in any project. Commands lazy-load them
If CLAUDE.md has custom content, user should decide whether to replace with stack template
All workflow references live in .claude/CLAUDE.md — single source of truth

decisions.decision: Remove docs/skills.md block, fix agent count to 2
decisions.rationale: docs/skills.md deleted in agent-architecture-redesign Plan 02. Only implementer + debugger remain
init.md currently falls back to root CLAUDE.md which has cnogo-specific content

constraints: Python stdlib only — no external deps
Backward compatible — existing target projects must not break
